---
id: events-ingest
title: "Ingest an event"
description: "Send an event to your Hook0 application. Matching subscriptions will be triggered, if any."

  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Ingest an event"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/event/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Send an event to your Hook0 application. Matching subscriptions will be triggered, if any.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}

>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

>
